steps.name: Wait for selector getByRole('button', { name: 'Accepter les cookies' })
Wait for selector getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Mot de passe' })
Wait for selector getByRole('button', { name: 'Se connecter' })
Wait for selector getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Nom de la société' })
Wait for selector getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Numéro SIREN' })
Fill "Graham and Sons" getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Nom de la société' })
Wait for selector getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Mot de passe', exact: true })
Wait for selector getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Confirmer le mot de passe' })
Fill "Password123!" getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Mot de passe', exact: true })
Fill "Password123!" getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Confirmer le mot de passe' })
Dashboard -> Start with paymium step1: ID Verification -> Names
Wait for selector getByRole('dialog').last().getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Nom de famille' })
Start with paymium step1: ID Verification -> Address
Fill "Boulevard de Sébastopol, 75001 Paris, France" getByRole('dialog').last().getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Adresse' })
Wait for selector getByText(/^Boulevard de Sébastopol, 75001 Paris, France$/)
Click getByText(/^Boulevard de Sébastopol, 75001 Paris, France$/)
Wait for selector getByText(/^Boulevard de Sébastopol, 75001 Paris, France$/)
Start with paymium step1: ID Verification -> Phone number
Start with paymium step1: ID Verification -> Phone OTP
Start with paymium step1: ID Verification -> KYC
Wait for selector getByRole('dialog').last().getByText('Vérification de votre identité')
Wait for selector getByRole('dialog').last().getByText('Vérification de votre identité')
Start with paymium step2: Company Identification / Informations
